# LOMSetupRequestResponse

**Device Management Command**

A response from the device after it processes the command to get information from a device to set up lights-out management (LOM).

## Declaration

```swift
object LOMSetupRequestResponse
```

## Objects

- **LOMSetupRequestResponse.ErrorChainItem**: A dictionary that describes an error chain item.

## Commands and responses

- **LOMSetupRequestCommand**: The command to get information from a device to set up lights-out management (LOM).
